generated_oml:
instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based geometric model in Revit and IFC format with semantic annotations including Instance General UUIDs and IFC types (e.g., IFCLIGHTFIXTURETYPE)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework
]

instance BuildingSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors modeled as BCS devices within BIM using Revit custom families"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmitted
]

instance SensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingSensor
    base:desc "Sensor data transmitted with 1-second heartbeat mechanism"
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for lighting systems (IFCLIGHTFIXTURETYPE) controlled via on/off state, brightness, and color temperature in Kelvin"
]

instance UnrealTwinController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller for Unreal Engine 5 twin using delegates and observable pattern"
]

instance DittoController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller for device communication via Eclipse Ditto"
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT connectivity and resilient at-least-once message delivery"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, AutomatedControlService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and policy-based validation of sensor and actuator data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, AutomatedControlService
]

instance EclipseBasyx : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Basyx as an open-source Industry 4.0 platform"
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeConfigurationManagementService
]

instance BentleyItwinJS : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Bentley Systems' itwin.js for infrastructure digital twin applications"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) frameworks for automating BIM model transformation into deployable DT artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables OneClickDeploymentService, RuntimeConfigurationManagementService
]

instance TwinLightResearch : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TwinLight research project providing foundational development context"
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomAnalyticsService
]

instance BOREALISResearch : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BOREALIS research project providing foundational development context"
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomAnalyticsService
]

instance OneClickDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "One-click deployment of DT artifacts from enriched BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentAction
]

instance RuntimeConfigurationManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Runtime configuration management for dynamic adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeConfigurationAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 visualization for real-time monitoring and control with spatial filtering by building storey"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoring, SpatialFiltering
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for live data synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoring
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for fault detection and maintenance planning"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight, MaintenancePlanningInsight
]

instance ResourceOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Resource optimization for energy efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyEfficiencyInsight
]

instance AutomatedControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated control logic execution for building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides SetLightingOn, SetLightingBrightness, SetLightingColorTemperature
]

instance CustomAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Custom analytics services for operational decision-making via modular architecture extension points"

]

]

]

    base:desc "Maintenance planning through predictive analytics"
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Energy efficiency optimization through resource optimization service"
]

instance OperationalDecisionSupport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational decision-making support through custom analytics"
]

]

    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true

    base:desc "Automated deployment of DT artifacts with one-click"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BuildingInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure in AECO domain for the entire building lifecycle from design to operation"
    base:contains BuildingSensor, LightingActuator, UnrealTwinController, DittoController, BuildingBIMModel
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands are initiated from the digital twin via WebSocket connections to Eclipse Ditto, routed through Eclipse Hono to physical devices, with confirmation of execution required before updating the digital twin's state (e.g., switch state), ensuring bidirectional synchronization."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system utilizes a 1-second heartbeat mechanism for real-time synchronization between physical assets and the digital twin, with a timeliness score of 0.997. Data exchange is managed via Eclipse Hono and Ditto, ensuring continuous updates with minimal latency."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The framework employs a central hub architecture coordinating roles: Building Control Engineers (device modeling and deployment initiation), Facility Managers (real-time monitoring and control), and DT Engineers (service integration). Model-driven engineering (MDE) transforms enriched BIM models into deployable artifacts, while Eclipse Hono and Ditto enable bidirectional data exchange. The modular architecture supports scalable, service-oriented development through standardized extension points."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses requirements elicitation, BIM modeling using Autodesk Revit with custom families and property sets for device metadata, IFC export and model checking (e.g., Instance General UUID validation), automated deployment via model-driven transformation pipeline, runtime operation with real-time data synchronization using Eclipse Hono and Ditto, and evolution through modular service integration. Roles include Building Control Engineers for initial modeling, Facility Managers for monitoring/control, and DT Engineers for extending functionality."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated through the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric (Timeliness=0.997, Reliability=1.0, Availability=1.0), measured over 12-minute intervals with 1-second heartbeat synchronization. Validation includes IFC-based model checking for metadata (e.g., UUID presence), Ditto policy enforcement for data ranges, and pre-execution checks for actuator commands. Fault tolerance is ensured by Hono's message persistence and Ditto's event storage, maintaining synchronization integrity with no observable divergence during testing."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical network infrastructure utilizes Eclipse Hono for IoT device communication and Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management, with HTTP POST and WebSocket protocols for data transfer between the UE5 visualization layer and Ditto. Specifics on network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, and security are not detailed in the documents."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems uses Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time bidirectional data synchronization. Standardized data schemas and modular extension points ensure interoperability with Building Control Systems (BCS) and enterprise systems, addressing fragmented data through semantic standardization."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with Industry Foundation Classes (IFC) standard for BIM data exchange, requiring standardized device types (e.g., IFCLIGHTFIXTURETYPE) and Instance General UUIDs. NF1 interoperability ensures compatibility across heterogeneous BIM tools, IoT protocols (Eclipse Hono and Ditto), and visualization systems (UE5)."
]
